# CWE-312 — Cleartext Storage of Sensitive Information (safe)
lang: go
file: CWE-312-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/aes"
	"crypto/cipher"
	"crypto/rand"
	"io"
	"os"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type Patient struct {
	ID         uint
	SSNCipher  []byte
	SSNNonce   []byte
}

// Safe: encrypts SSN at rest with AES-GCM before insert.
func StorePatient(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB) {
	key := []byte(os.Getenv("DATA_KEY"))
	block, _ := aes.NewCipher(key)
	gcm, _ := cipher.NewGCM(block)
	nonce := make([]byte, gcm.NonceSize())
	_, _ = io.ReadFull(rand.Reader, nonce)
	ciphertext := gcm.Seal(nil, nonce, []byte(c.PostForm("ssn")), nil)
	rec := Patient{SSNCipher: ciphertext, SSNNonce: nonce}
	db.Create(&rec)
	c.JSON(201, gin.H{"id": rec.ID})
}
